steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The answer must state Browner's claim and support it with specific evidence from the notes. The key evidence is that CacégaAyuwípi incorporates a Chinook hand drum — a traditional Native instrument — showing Ballard's compositions rely on Native musical elements.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — omits Browner's claim': Offers evidence but never states the claim it is meant to support. ✗
  • Choice B — states the claim without evidence': Asserts Browner's position but provides no specific supporting detail from the notes. ✗
  • Choice C — includes irrelevant details': Brings in information that does not directly illustrate reliance on Native musical traditions. ✗
  • Choice D — 'states Browner's claim and cites the Chinook hand drum in CacégaAyuwípi': Names the claim and supplies the specific evidence that directly supports it. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
